findings: Board has 7 members with 4 independent directors meeting the 50% independence threshold.
recommendations: Consider appointing a female director to improve gender diversity on the board.

findings: Annual report submitted to Ministry of Finance within statutory deadline.
recommendations: Enhance disclosure of related-party transactions in portfolio companies.

findings: Tailings storage facility requires remediation. Acid mine drainage monitoring is below required frequency.
recommendations: Allocate ZMW 850M for tailings remediation; increase monitoring frequency to weekly.

requirement: Annual General Meeting and Shareholder Reporting
findings: AGM held within statutory timeframe. Shareholder reports distributed on schedule.
recommendations: Improve quality of management discussion and analysis section in annual report.

findings: All ERRA licence conditions met. Tariff filings submitted on time.
recommendations: Strengthen customer complaint resolution process to meet 48-hour response target.

findings: Performance contract signed with ZCCM-IH and Ministry of Finance for FY2024.
recommendations: Include ESG metrics in performance contract for FY2025.
